question: When a substance in the materials table is written in italics it means
canonical_answer:
a. It is not the proper shipping name - those in roman-type above it are
b. It is a foreign substance
c. The substance is for international transport
d. It is the proper shipping name

A

appears_in.title: Cdl Hazmat Practice Test
appears_in.answer: it is not the proper shipping name. Only those in roman type above it are proper shipping name
